name: Lulu

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Pix, Faerie Companion
passive.description_source: Innate:  Lulu is assisted by Pix, whom follows her around. Whenever Lulu basic attacks, Pix fires 3 bolts that deal magic damage to the first enemy hit.

effects.description: Innate: Lulu is assisted by Pix, an untargetable faerie, who follows her around and fires a barrage of 3 bolts towards her target whenever she uses a basic attack on-attack. Each bolt deals 5 : 43 (based on level) (+ 5% AP) magic damage to the first enemy it collides with, for a total of 15 : 129 (based on level) (+ 15% AP) on hitting a single target with all three bolts.
Casting Help, Pix! on an ally champion transfers Pix's help to them, causing him to fire the bolts dependent on their basic attacks.
Pix snaps back to Lulu if she is too far away.

passive.description: Innate: Lulu is assisted by Pix, an untargetable faerie, who follows her around and fires a barrage of 3 bolts towards her target whenever she uses a basic attack on-attack. Each bolt deals 5 : 43 (based on level) (+ 5% AP) magic damage to the first enemy it collides with, for a total of 15 : 129 (based on level) (+ 15% AP) on hitting a single target with all three bolts.

basic_ability_1.name: Glitterlance
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Lulu and  Pix each fire a magic bolt toward the target location, dealing magic damage and  slowing enemies hit for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Active: Lulu and Pix each fire a magic bolt towards the target point, each one dealing magic damage to enemies hit, reduced to 70% against minions, and slowing them by 80% decaying over 2 seconds.
Active: Lulu and Pix each fire a magic bolt towards the target point, each one dealing magic damage to enemies hit, reduced to 70% against minions, and slowing them by 80% decaying over 2 seconds.
Enemies take 50% damage from a second bolt.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Lulu and Pix each fire a magic bolt towards the target point, each one dealing magic damage to enemies hit, reduced to 70% against minions, and slowing them by 80% decaying over 2 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.

basic_ability_2.name: Whimsy
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Lulu can cast Whimsy on herself or the target champion.

effects.description: Active: Lulu can cast Whimsy on herself or a champion.

effects.context_notes: Enemy Cast: Lulu launches a spell onto the target enemy champion that polymorphs them into a harmless critter for a duration, during which their movement speed is reduced by 60, and disarms them for the same duration.
Self / Ally Cast: Lulu instantly casts erratic magic upon the target allied champion or herself, granting the target bonus attack speed and 25% (+ 5% per 100 AP) bonus movement speed for a duration.
Self / Ally Cast: Lulu instantly casts erratic magic upon the target allied champion or herself, granting the target bonus attack speed and 25% (+ 5% per 100 AP) bonus movement speed for a duration.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Lulu can cast Whimsy on herself or a champion.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Whimsy's movement speed reduction will apply to the target's bonus movement speed.

basic_ability_3.name: Help, Pix!
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Lulu can cast Help, Pix! on herself or a unit.

effects.description: Active: Lulu can cast Help, Pix! on herself or an ally or enemy.

effects.context_notes: Enemy Cast: Lulu sends Pix to the far side of the target enemy for 4 seconds, dealing magic damage and revealing them for the same duration.
Self / Ally Cast: Lulu sends Pix to the target ally for 6.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Lulu can cast Help, Pix! on herself or an ally or enemy.

ultimate.name: Wild Growth
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Lulu enchants herself or the target allied champion,  knocking up surrounding enemies.

effects.context_notes: Active: Lulu enlarges herself or the target allied champion, knocking up nearby enemies for 1 second.
Active: Lulu enlarges herself or the target allied champion, knocking up nearby enemies for 1 second.

ultimate.description: Active: Lulu enlarges herself or the target allied champion, knocking up nearby enemies for 1 second. For the next 7 seconds, the target gains bonus health and 40% increased size and slows nearby enemies, which lingers for 0.25 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Wild Growth's size increase scales additively with other size increases.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
